3270660.name: Sealand Survivor
3270660.description:
Sealand Sniper

Sealand Survivor is an intense survival game set on a secret artificial island built during World War II to defend Britain from enemy forces. This island, known as Sealand, was meant to be a last line of defense, but over time, it has become a mysterious and dangerous place. You are one of the few survivors exploring this isolated outpost, uncovering its forgotten secrets. However, you are not alone. Hostile forces frequently launch attacks, determined to prevent you from revealing the island's hidden past.

As you explore the rugged terrain of Sealand, you must complete a series of life-or-death missions to stay alive. The weather is harsh, and the island is plagued by unpredictable storms that can leave you exposed and vulnerable. To survive, you must locate and retrieve missing supplies scattered across the island, and race against the clock to avoid enemy ambushes.

Navigating Sealand isn’t easy. The island is full of narrow, dark passages and hidden areas where enemies lurk, waiting for the perfect moment to strike. The visibility is poor, especially at night, adding a layer of tension as you fight for your life in the shadows. Every choice matters, and every second counts.

Can you uncover the truth behind Sealand and escape before the enemy wipes you out? The clock is ticking, and your survival depends on your wit, your courage, and your ability to adapt to this perilous environment.
3270660.supported_languages: 英语, 土耳其语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 希腊语, 韩语, 俄语, 简体中文, 西班牙语 - 拉丁美洲, 乌克兰语
